title: Fresh flowers
description: add new things about flower in minecraft.
body:
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/603beabb1bebbeb1798d79d3e4a958cd4d59a604.png)

 **This mod adds new flowers to your old Minecraft.**

 **Fresh flowers is available for using Forge loader.**

 **Fresh flowers can only available in version 1.20.1.**
 
## ✅ Features:

- Add new flowers 🌺
- Add gardening scissors to get new flowers ✂️
- Add flower garlands and bouquets that can be made with new flowers 💐
- Add flower crown
